title: Arlong’s Rule Tightens Around Nami
scene: On pages 17–20, the story moves through Arlong Park and Nami’s dangerous position among the fish-men. Nami’s role with Arlong becomes harder to understand as loyalty, fear, and survival overlap.

dialogue.speaker: Cocoyasi villagers
dialogue.text: A-ARLONG, WAIT! You're not going to destroy another village, are you!?

dialogue.speaker: Cocoyasi villagers
dialogue.text: Human villages are easy to crush but our goal's to rule over them!

dialogue.speaker: Cocoyasi villagers
dialogue.text: If we turn this town into another Gosa village, then our tribute funds will decrease again!

dialogue.speaker: Cocoyasi villagers
dialogue.text: If our funds decrease, then all we have to do is conquer another village!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: After him! Don't let him escape!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Let's return him to Arlong Park for now!

dialogue.speaker: Cocoyasi villagers
dialogue.text: At this rate, he's going to anninhilate this entire village!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: But it looks like you've managed to live another day.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Ugh, it reeks! This egg is rotten!

summary: This part builds the Arlong Park conflict by showing how Nami’s choices look contradictory from outside while Arlong’s power keeps the island trapped.
